name: io.github.shivam-app-developers/ai-optimizer
description: MCP server that cuts AI coding agent token usage via framework-aware context optimization. Skips generated/build files, narrows reads via LSP, and strips shell noise before it reaches the model.

environmentVariables.name: AI_OPTIMIZER_LICENSE
environmentVariables.description: Ed25519-signed JWT license key. Unlocks Pro/Team framework packs and features. Free tier (Python + JS/TS) needs no key.

environmentVariables.name: AI_OPTIMIZER_LSP
environmentVariables.description: Set to 0 to disable the LSP bridge (optimized_diagnostics). Enabled by default when a language server is on PATH.

environmentVariables.name: AI_OPTIMIZER_TELEMETRY
environmentVariables.description: Set to 'on' to enable anonymous opt-in telemetry. Off by default; no install id is written to disk until the first send.

environmentVariables.name: AI_OPTIMIZER_BUDGET_PER_SESSION
environmentVariables.description: Optional hard cap on tokens read per session. When breached, data-path tools return an error with a reset hint.

environmentVariables.name: AI_OPTIMIZER_BUDGET_PER_DAY
environmentVariables.description: Optional hard cap on tokens read per UTC day (persisted, rolls at midnight).

environmentVariables.name: AI_OPTIMIZER_SHOW_DOLLAR_VALUES
environmentVariables.description: Set to 0 to suppress the inline dollar-value savings estimate. On by default (display-only).
